rationale: Both reviews catch the same three core correctness faults (True placeholders, IsUnipotent type mismatch), but Review 2 additionally identifies the content-free theorem `unipotentRadical_trivial'` and the trivial instance `instReductiveGroup` as dead code that should be removed, both confirmed in the diff; acting on Review 2 leaves a cleaner PR with no placeholder stubs or dangling artifacts.
